title: Croatian-Style Baked Hake
description: A flavorful and aromatic baked hake dish inspired by Croatian cuisine, featuring a mild and yeasty tagine crust.

ingredients.name: Mild tagine
ingredients.notes: Crushed and mixed with olive oil

instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Season the hake fillets with salt, pepper, and Croatian paprika.
Brush the hake fillets with olive oil on both sides.
Dip each fillet in the mild tagine, coating evenly.
Dip the coated fillets in the yeasty breadcrumbs, pressing gently to adhere.
Place the coated fillets on the prepared baking sheet.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until cooked through and the crust is golden brown.
Serve immediately, garnished with fresh parsley if desired.
